subject: Add apache utils to SO base image
commit_message:
Add apache utils to SO base image

To encode plain text passwords using htpasswd
apache utils has been added to SO base image

Issue-ID: SO-2932
Signed-off-by: Ramesh Parthasarathy(rp6768)<ramesh.parthasarathy@att.com>
Change-Id: Ic92ac23ff604d1c86c5fc3aeb1c328b8cdcecad1

entries.message:

Patch Set 1:

Hello,
IMHO, we shouldn't have add apache utils in the Docker (and same stands for curl netcat-openbsd and nss).
If you need it at init, do an init container.
